ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-16-2024 Continued To Nov-27-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Franchesca Callejo, Esq., for Macina Taylor, Successor Administrator.
Nancy Lofdahl, Esq., for Denise Smith, Administrator of related Estate.

The following related matters are called:
PES-18-301880; PES-20-304064; PES-21-304527; and PES-21-304896.

At the court's query, counsel offers an update on the subject matters and the status of settlement. Ms. Lofdahl reports that there is a delay in listing and selling the Estate's real property due to a pending Unlawful Detainer matter and provides the court with the case number (CUD-24-675768). The court instructs counsel to file a petition to approve status of the estate in this matter and each related matter. Upon agreement by counsel and the court, the above-referenced petitions are to be filed by Nov-13-2024.

The subject matter is continued to Nov-27-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Lopez. Not Reported.

Off Calendar Mar-13-2023 Continued To Apr-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Mar-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Franchesca Callejo, via ZOOM, for Macina Taylor, Petitioner.

The court confirms with Ms. Callejo that she does not foresee any issues arising from the delay of administration of this estate. Ms. Callejo reports regarding the status of the estate with the goal being to sell the real property and make distributions. The court confirms that no one is appearing to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Macina Taylor is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $250,000. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Mar-13-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two-weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Glisson. Not reported.
